title: And There Was Only One Bed
description: Lets multiple players sleep in one bed to skip the night.
body:
# And There Was Only One Bed

### FEATURES

Removes the requirement for every player on a server to have their own bed, and lets them share instead. Useful if you're short on beds or just feeling romantic.

### NOTES

* This mod requires Forge.
* You have permission to use this mod in packs. Refer to the license for other questions about distribution.
* The source code and issue tracker are available [on Github](https://github.com/J4gm/and_there_was_only_one_bed).
* If you want to follow me on social media, check out [my Tumblr](https://www.tumblr.com/j4gm).
